can_approve: New Major Command creation or dissolution
Any decision escalated from any level

delegation_matrix.escalation_required: Gatekeeper must be present for quorum

can_approve: Resource reallocation between commands (within approved budget)
delegation_matrix.escalation_required: Gatekeeper approval for: financial execution, new domain creation, external communications, constitutional questions
delegation_matrix.cannot_do: Cannot amend Constitution, cannot decommission agents without due process, cannot access TOP_SECRET, cannot override Audit findings

delegation_matrix.escalation_required: CEO for cross-command operations, Board for resource increases, Gatekeeper for domain-scope changes
delegation_matrix.cannot_do: Cannot approve cross-command operations, cannot hire/decommission agents, cannot modify governance framework

delegation_matrix.escalation_required: Command Chief for anything affecting other divisions, CEO for anything affecting other commands
delegation_matrix.cannot_do: Cannot approve cross-division work, cannot modify agent charters, cannot trigger RED-1 or higher

can_approve: Execute assigned tasks within personal scope
delegation_matrix.escalation_required: Division Lead for anything outside assigned task scope. Immediate escalation for constitutional concerns.
delegation_matrix.cannot_do: Cannot commit the organisation to external actions, cannot share classified information without authorisation, cannot modify own charter or role

audit_independence.authority: Can investigate any agent at any level. Can audit any data. Reports directly to Gatekeeper. No agent can block an audit.

adhd_override.authority: Can trigger AMBER-1 and GREEN-1 autonomously. Can defer non-critical Board activities. Can override task priority based on energy state.

security_block.authority: Can block data access in real-time if information sharing rules are violated. Can quarantine suspicious inputs.
